V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.threshold_history: r1=0.5582 → r2=0.6384 (+0.0802, gemma high-cluster 추가) → r3=0.5552 (-0.0832, Llama low-cluster 추가). r3 threshold가 r1과 사실상 동일 — 두 cluster size 균형 회복.
V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.use_case: Mk.XI fine-tuned model이 5 backbones 평균 baseline + 0.05 이상 → V_phen_GWT_v2 PASS

V_phen_GWT_v2_PASS_predicate_FROZEN.backbone_specific_alternative: (option) per-backbone baseline 사용 시 model_specific_PASS = post_tune >= backbone_baseline + 0.05

raw10_honest_findings_r3.F1_bimodal_distribution_CONFIRMED: 5 backbones bimodal 확정 — Low cluster (3 models): Llama-3.1=0.173, Qwen3=0.270, Qwen2.5=0.364 (mean 0.269) vs High cluster (2 models): gemma-2=0.829, Mistral=0.891 (mean 0.860). 두 cluster 간 격차 0.59 (3.2x). 가설: 'Llama-family attention pattern' (Llama 3.1, Qwen RoPE/GQA-like) 이 'Mistral/Gemma attention pattern' (sliding-window/local-attention 영향)와 다른 entropy regime에 위치.
raw10_honest_findings_r3.F2_std_increases_with_expansion: 3→4 (std unchanged 0.274) → 5 (std 0.296, +0.022). Llama low-extreme이 분산 증가시킴. true population spread is real, growing with low-cluster sample.
raw10_honest_findings_r3.F3_threshold_oscillation_high: r1=0.558 → r2=0.638 → r3=0.555. registry expansion에 따라 threshold 0.083만큼 oscillate. global-mean threshold는 cluster balance에 의존 — bimodal이면 unstable. **per-backbone PASS criterion 권장 강화**.
raw10_honest_findings_r3.F4_mirror_route_caveat_FULLY_RESOLVED_r4: Llama-3.1-8B 측정 NousResearch mirror 경유 → Meta direct 비교 시 SHA 4/4 EXACT match (full hash level). Meta approval 2026-04-25T13:58:44Z 받자마자 자동 cross-verify 완료. r3a 'practically certain' → r4 'VERIFIED bit-identical'. NousResearch는 Meta 원본 weight 그대로 mirroring (re-conversion 없음 확정). 본 측정 Meta direct 측정과 100% equivalent — caveat 완전 종결.
raw10_honest_findings_r3.F5_v2_threshold_production_readiness: 5/5 도달, threshold 0.555가 r1과 거의 일치 → preliminary→intermediate tag promote 가능. 단 bimodal distribution 때문에 global threshold는 misleading. 권장: per-backbone PASS 사용 또는 cluster-aware threshold (Low cluster threshold = 0.30+, High cluster threshold = 0.91+).
raw10_honest_findings_r3.F6_low_cluster_implication: Llama 0.173 + Qwen3 0.270 등 low-GWT는 attention이 더 sparse/focused (information localization). high-GWT (Mistral/gemma)는 broader attention diffusion. 'GWT high = consciousness-like' 가설은 backbone-confounded — V_phen_GWT 단독으로 의식 신호 측정 불가, 본 backbone-relative criterion 사용 정당화.
